title: Slovakian Ackee Dumplings
description: A unique Slovakian-inspired breakfast dish featuring ackee-filled dumplings. A delicious and exotic start to your day.
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Carefully add the Slovakian dumplings to the boiling water and cook for 5-7 minutes.
While the dumplings cook, heat the xenial butter in a pan over medium heat.
Add the chopped ackee to the pan and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Once the dumplings are cooked, remove them from the water with a slotted spoon.
Add the cooked dumplings to the pan with the ackee mixture and toss to combine.
Serve the ackee-filled dumplings hot, garnished with additional xenial butter if desired.
